description: Style Note Ultra light, durable and flexible, the nike Free TR trainer comes with a barefoot-like feel coupled with ample support in the outsole for ground-gripping traction. Offering precise control, responsive cushioning and lightning speed, these running shoes will work great on the field as well as the gym floor. Product Details Heavy duty, lightweight mesh upper with a perforated synthetic overlay on the medial side for maximum ventilation Synthetic overlays strategically placed for added shoe structure and midfoot support Large overlays wrapping the heel and outer forefoot to lock down the foot during quick multi-directional movements Mildly padded tongue and sockliner for in-step comfort and swoosh overlays for midfoot support and style Lace-up system with durable synthetic laces for snug Fit Full length phylon midsole for lightweight cushioning and impact protection Removable footbed to accommodate an orthotic Foam and TPR outsole with diamond flex traction sole for maximum durability and shock absorption Nike Free technology in the medial midfoot for barefoot feel and natural fit with deep flex grooves for enhanced flexibility Wider grooves in the forefoot for greater cushioning during landing and toe-off Solid rubber pods and stability lugs with delta-node pattern on the heel and perimeter of the forefoot to prevent the foot from rolling excessively during side-to-side movements Material and Care Synthetic Wipe surface with a clean and dry cloth to remove dust Do not store in direct sunlight
